The majority of Perplexity AI visitors are from the United States, representing 20.09% of the total traffic.
India follows as the second largest contributor, representing 11.01% of the traffic, while Germany ranks third with 5.36%.
Within this small segment, YouTube contributes the largest share, accounting for 80.98% of the social traffic.
This indicates that while social media may not be a significant source of overall traffic, YouTube has proven to be essential for Perplexity AI in engaging users.

Perplexity AI has introduced WANDR (Wide ANd Deep Research), an open benchmark designed to evaluate how effectively artificial intelligence systems perform large-scale research tasks that require both broad information discovery and detailed evidence collection.
The benchmark includes more than 170,000 source-backed records across its 500 tasks, providing a large-scale testing environment for research-oriented AI agents.

On identical production traffic, SPACE reduced median sandbox creation latency from 185 ms to","score":0.76173395,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://explainx.ai/blog/perplexity-wandr-benchmark-open-source-research-agents-july-2026","title":"WANDR Benchmark Open Source — July 2026","content":"# Perplexity Open-Sources WANDR — 500-Task Benchmark for Wide & Deep Research. Jul 14, 2026: Perplexity releases WANDR — 500 research tasks, 170,495 evidence records, Apache 2.0 on GitHub. SaC leads at 0.363 soft F1; hard F1 tops 0.133. On **July 14, 2026**, **Perplexity** (@perplexity\\_ai) **open-sourced WANDR** — **Wide ANd Deep Research** — the internal benchmark it built to train and measure **Perplexity Computer**'s **wide-and-deep** research stack. The release ships **500 tasks**, **170,495 required source-backed records**, an **Apache 2.0** GitHub harness, and a blunt headline number: even **Search as Code** — Perplexity's best system — hits only **0.133 hard F1** on the full suite. Where DRACO asks *\"write a complete objective report,\"* WANDR asks *\"find every qualifying company, employee, filing, or competitor — and prove each row with a page that actually says what you claim.\"* explainx.ai maps **task shape**, **grading**, **leaderboard reality**, and **why Perplexity published it now**. **WANDR** (July 14, 2026) is Perplexity's **open Apache 2.0 benchmark** for **wide-and-deep research agents**: **500 tasks**, **170,495** required evidence records, **hierarchical qualification trees**, and **reference-free URL re-fetch grading**.","score":0.6466616,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://daily.dev/posts/perplexity-open-sources-wandr-its-internal-research-benchmark-ezcwbflky","title":"Perplexity open sources WANDR, its internal research benchmark","content":"Perplexity is open sourcing WANDR, an internal benchmark developed to evaluate and build deep and wide research capabilities within Perplexity","score":0.59457535,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://asksurf.ai/pulse/en/perplexity-space-sandbox","title":"Perplexity's SPACE Sandbox for AI Agents | Surf AI","content":"To pick up a draggable item, press the space bar. While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the item. Press space again to drop the item in its new position, or press escape to cancel. ### Perplexity's SPACE Sandbox for AI Agents. A runtime platform for running agents safely in production. * SPACE is the isolated environment layer for Perplexity Computer. * It's been handling all production traffic since June. * The focus is on secure code execution and persistent agent state. ## Perplexity's New Sandbox. Perplexity introduced SPACE, a secure sandbox runtime for long-running agent sessions in Perplexity Computer. SPACE is the infrastructure behind Perplexity Computer. It spins up isolated spots for code execution, file handling, and keeping AI agent workflows running. The company says it's been powering all production traffic since June, so this is already live at scale. It fits the industry move toward AI that can actually use a computer in a controlled way.","score":0.586926,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.92,"request_id":"78022bc4-1f99-41b4-9d86-d09157a5ef3e"}
